env.name: TINYFISH_API_KEY
env.description: TinyFish API key for live web research (Search and Fetch APIs).

env.name: VAPI_API_KEY
env.description: Vapi API key for voice assistant setup and calls.

env.name: REDIS_URL
env.description: Redis connection URL for run state, evidence, and memory.

env.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
env.description: OpenAI API key for LLM market atlas synthesis.

env.name: APP_BASE_URL
env.description: Public HTTPS base URL of the deployed app. Required for Vapi custom tool endpoint.

env.name: DEMO_MODE
env.description: Set to 'true' to return fixture data without live API calls. Safe for demos.
